mapper.select: SELECT email, company, role, is_active AS active, created_at, updated_at FROM dbo.INTERNAL_USER ORDER BY email, company, role
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.INTERNAL_USER (email, company, role, is_active) VALUES (#{email}, #{company}, #{role}, #{active})
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.INTERNAL_USER SET company = #{company}, role = #{role}, is_active = #{active}, updated_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE email = #{origEmail} AND company = #{origCompany} AND role = #{origRole}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dbo.INTERNAL_USER WHERE email = #{email} AND company = #{company} AND role = #{role}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT email FROM dbo.INTERNAL_USER WHERE role = #{role} AND is_active = 1
SELECT DISTINCT email FROM dbo.INTERNAL_USER WHERE company = #{company} AND is_active = 1
